# Security policy

## Supported versions

deltached is currently in early development. Until 1.0, security fixes are
applied to the latest published release only.

| Version        | Supported |
| -------------- | --------- |
| Latest release | Yes       |
| Older releases | No        |

## Report a vulnerability

Please do not open a public issue for a suspected vulnerability.

Use GitHub's
[private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/Jimieee/deltached/security/advisories/new)
and include:

- the affected version and environment;
- a clear description of the impact;
- reproduction steps or a minimal proof of concept; and
- any suggested mitigation, if you have one.

The maintainer will acknowledge the report as soon as reasonably possible,
investigate it, and coordinate disclosure with you. Please allow time for a fix
to be prepared before publishing details.

General bugs and questions belong in the public issue tracker or Discussions.
